subcodes.first_line: O Nadhir! The All-Knowing maketh mention of thee, when He was held captive in the hands of the transgressors who seized Him and imprisoned Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نذیر یذکرک الخبیر اذ کان اسیرا بین ایدی المعتدین قد اخذوه و حبسوه فی هذا
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @suffering and imprisonment, @prophecy and fulfillment, @knowledge; recognition of God
